So initial state has many things already done for shift_candidate_alpha, but not for origin_availability_alpha and destination_availability_alpha. We need to achieve goals for those.

We need to make origin_availability_alpha candidate_prepared. Currently it is candidate_created and vehicle_allocated (since vehicle_allocated origin_availability_alpha is true).
